title: Joseph Feiss Pants Mens 32x32 Linen Tapered Tropical Beach Classic Beige
description: The Joseph Feiss Men's Linen Tapered Pants in classic beige are designed for a stylish and comfortable beach or travel look. Made from lightweight and breathable linen fabric with a canvas texture, these pants feature a zip, button, and drawstring closure, as well as pockets for convenience. The tapered leg style and flat front add a modern touch to the chino style, making them a versatile option for casual and business occasions. Machine washable and featuring a solid pattern, these pants offer a relaxed fit for a relaxed yet put-together look.
